_agentNote: NOT AN ALLOWLIST. Any Robinhood Chain token can exist off-catalog. This file hints how hood.markets catalog tokens route swaps (Simple V3 vs Pro V4). Always call GET /api/agent/token-info before prepare-buy|prepare-sell — never refuse a 0x address solely because it is missing here.
chainRequirement: Abort if Bankr wallet/provider does not explicitly support Robinhood Chain 4663 — no fallback. See references/CHAIN-4663.md

detection.poolIdRule: catalog poolId starting with v3: → simple (Uniswap V3). Otherwise in-catalog → pro (V4 swap helper).

simple.label: Simple (Uniswap V3)
simple.agentBuySell: Use uniswapSwapUrl from token-info or prepare-buy error hint — prepare-buy/sell returns 400 for V3 tokens

pro.label: Pro (Uniswap V4)
pro.agentBuySell: POST /api/agent/prepare-buy or prepare-sell → validate txs → Bankr /wallet/submit chainId 4663

deployPreflight.secondDeployIn24h: warning rate_limit_would_force_platform_fee — proceed after user yes; fees on new token go to hood.markets platform

feeClaim.forAnyone: POST /api/agent/claim-for-recipient { tokenAddress } — verify token-info first — NO Bankr /wallet/submit
feeClaim.ownWallet: POST /api/agent/claim — JWT or X wallet — NO Bankr /wallet/submit
feeClaim.preVerify: GET /api/agent/token-info before claim-for-recipient — confirm feeRecipientAddress and catalog membership
feeClaim.abuse: Catalog-only tokens; idempotent when no fees; do not batch without per-token user intent
feeClaim.v3Modern: v0.7+ tokens: API calls claimTradingFees() on Holder NFT — pro-rata to all share holders
feeClaim.v3Legacy: v0.6 tokens: HoodMarketsV3.claimRewards(token) — fee wallet only
feeClaim.successReply: When ok:true post replyHint if RESPONSE-SAFETY schema passes — do NOT say Bankr failed to submit a tx

holderNfts.buyerRewards: post-launch only — fundBuyerRewardPool / cancelBuyerRewardPool on token page (v0.9+)
holderNfts.deployParamBuyerRewards: buyerRewardShareCount optional in API deploy only — web UI uses post-launch fund; prefer post-launch
holderNfts.batchAirdrop: airdropShares one tx (v0.10+ bytecode; full amounts v0.11+). Web probes contract before batch — not legacy per-wallet sends
holderNfts.webFeeRecipientOther: hood.markets Launch tab Someone else = 0x wallet address only
holderNfts.swapTradingFeeSplit: 5% platform / 95% pro-rata to share holders (LP locker at claimTradingFees)
holderNfts.noFundLpOnSite: Launch LP locked — users buy/sell token on Uniswap, not fund LP on hood.markets
holderNfts.agentRestrictions: Agents: claim fees via API only — NO airdropShares, buyShares, listShares, fundBuyerRewardPool via Bankr submit
